ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: A hodgepodge of hopefully helpful functions. Two of these perform shrinkage estimation: one using a simple weighted method where the user can specify the degree of shrinkage required, and one using James-Stein shrinkage estimation for the case of unequal variances.

A hodgepodge of hopefully helpful functions. Two of these perform shrinkage estimation: one using a simple weighted method where the user can specify the degree of shrinkage required, and one using James-Stein shrinkage estimation for the case of unequal variances.

name: r-bayesbio
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '1.0.0' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-bayesbio
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/bayesbio_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/bayesbio/bayesbio_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 406f27fd63001d9b046cb7d340656d50616a6973d8fd39ecb191b33c3f250a23

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
  run:
    - r-base

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('bayesbio')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('bayesbio')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=bayesbio
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  summary: >-
    A hodgepodge of hopefully helpful functions. Two of these perform shrinkage
    estimation: one using a simple weighted method where the user can specify the
    degree of shrinkage required, and one using James-Stein shrinkage estimation
    for the case of unequal variances.
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: bayesbio
# Title: Miscellaneous Functions for Bioinformatics and Bayesian Statistics
# Version: 1.0.0
# Authors@R: person("Andrew", "McKenzie", email = "amckenz@gmail.com", role = c("aut", "cre"))
# Description: A hodgepodge of hopefully helpful functions. Two of these perform shrinkage estimation: one using a simple weighted method where the user can specify the degree of shrinkage required, and one using James-Stein shrinkage estimation for the case of unequal variances.
# Depends: R (>= 3.2.0)
# Suggests: ggplot2, RISmed, testthat
# License: GPL-3
# Encoding: UTF-8
# LazyData: true
# RoxygenNote: 5.0.1
# NeedsCompilation: no
# Packaged: 2016-05-24 13:50:20 UTC; amckenz
# Author: Andrew McKenzie [aut, cre]
# Maintainer: Andrew McKenzie <amckenz@gmail.com>
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2016-05-24 16:32:42
